title: Synthyris bullii

Synthyris bullii's classification reflects its close relationship with other plants in the same family and order.

intro: Synthyris bullii, also known as Bull's synthyris or western alpine synthyris, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations.
